info.title: Microsoft Graph Excel API
info.description: The Microsoft Graph Excel API enables web and mobile applications to read and modify Excel workbooks stored in OneDrive for Business, SharePoint sites, or Group drives. It supports CRUD operations on worksheets, tables, ranges, charts, named items, and workbook functions. Only Office Open XML (.xlsx) formatted workbooks are supported.

post.description: Create a new workbook session. Sessions can be persistent (changes saved) or non-persistent (changes discarded when session expires).

persistChanges.description: If true, changes are persisted (saved). If false, changes are temporary.

get.description: Retrieve a list of worksheet objects in the workbook.

post.description: Add a new worksheet to the workbook.

name.description: The name of the worksheet to add.

get.description: Retrieve the properties and relationships of a worksheet object.

patch.description: Update the properties of a worksheet object (e.g., name, position, visibility).

delete.description: Delete a worksheet from the workbook.

get.description: Retrieve the properties and relationships of a range specified by its address (e.g., A1:B2).

patch.description: Update the properties of a range (values, formulas, number format).

get.description: Get the used range of the worksheet (the smallest range that encompasses any cells that have a value or formatting).

post.description: Apply sort to the used range of a worksheet.

get.description: Retrieve a list of table objects in the workbook.
Retrieve a list of table objects in a specific worksheet.
Retrieve the properties and relationships of a table object.

patch.description: Update the properties of a table object.

post.description: Convert a table to a normal range of cells. All data is preserved.

get.description: Retrieve a list of table row objects.

post.description: Add a new row to a table.

index.description: The relative position of the new row. If null, the addition happens at the end.

values.description: A 2D array of unformatted values of the table row.

delete.description: Delete a row from a table at a specific index.

parameters.name: row-index
parameters.description: The zero-based index of the row to delete.

get.description: Retrieve a list of table column objects.

post.description: Add a new column to a table.

index.description: The zero-based index position of the new column.

values.description: A 2D array of unformatted values of the table column.

delete.description: Delete a column from a table.

parameters.name: column-id-or-name
parameters.description: The ID or name of the column.

post.description: Apply a filter to a table column.
Clear the filter on a table column.

get.description: Retrieve a list of chart objects in a worksheet.

post.description: Create a new chart in a worksheet.

type.description: The chart type (e.g., ColumnClustered, Line, Pie).

sourcedata.description: The range address of the source data (e.g., A1:C4).

seriesby.description: How columns/rows are used as data series (Auto, Columns, Rows).

get.description: Retrieve the properties and relationships of a chart object.

patch.description: Update the properties of a chart object.

delete.description: Delete a chart from a worksheet.

post.description: Update the source data for a chart.

sourceData.description: The range address of the source data.

seriesBy.description: How columns/rows are used as data series.

get.description: Render the chart as a base64-encoded image.
Retrieve a list of named item objects in the workbook.

post.description: Invoke an Excel workbook function (e.g., SUM, AVERAGE, PMT) and return the result.

parameters.name: function-name
parameters.description: The name of the Excel function to call (e.g., pmt, sum, average).

requestBody.description: Function-specific parameters as a JSON object.

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization via Microsoft identity platform.

worksheetIdOrName.name: worksheet-id-or-name
worksheetIdOrName.description: The worksheet ID (URL-encoded GUID) or name.

sessionId.name: workbook-session-id
sessionId.description: Workbook session ID. If provided, changes are scoped to the session. If omitted, changes are persisted directly.

id.description: The session ID to use in subsequent requests.

persistChanges.description: Whether changes in this session are persisted.

id.description: The unique identifier of the worksheet.

name.description: The display name of the worksheet.

position.description: The zero-based position of the worksheet within the workbook.

visibility.description: The visibility of the worksheet (Visible, Hidden, VeryHidden).

name.description: The new name of the worksheet.

address.description: The range reference in A1-style (e.g., Sheet1!A1:B2).

addressLocal.description: The range reference in the user's locale.

cellCount.description: Number of cells in the range.

columnCount.description: Number of columns in the range.

rowCount.description: Number of rows in the range.

hidden.description: Whether the entire range is hidden.

formulas.description: 2D array of formulas in A1-style notation.

formulasLocal.description: 2D array of formulas in user's locale.

formulasR1C1.description: 2D array of formulas in R1C1-style notation.

valueTypes.description: 2D array of value types (String, Integer, Double, Boolean, Empty, Error).

id.description: The unique identifier of the table.

showHeaders.description: Whether the header row is visible.

showTotals.description: Whether the total row is visible.

index.description: Zero-based index of the row within the table.

values.description: 2D array of raw values of the row.

id.description: The unique identifier of the column.

index.description: Zero-based index of the column within the table.

values.description: 2D array of raw values of the column.

id.description: The unique identifier of the chart.

left.description: The distance from the left side of the chart to the worksheet origin, in points.

top.description: The distance from the top edge of the chart to the top of the worksheet, in points.

name.description: The name of the named item.

type.description: The type of the named item (Range, String, Integer, Double, Boolean).

value.description: The value of the named item.

visible.description: Whether the named item is visible.

filterOn.description: The type of filter (e.g., custom, values, topItems, bottomItems).

operator.description: The operator for combining criterion1 and criterion2 (and, or).

error.description: Error string if the function failed, null otherwise.

value.description: The result value of the function.

tags.name: Workbook Sessions
tags.description: Manage workbook sessions for persistent or non-persistent operations.

tags.name: Worksheets
tags.description: CRUD operations on worksheets within a workbook.

tags.name: Ranges
tags.description: Read and update cell ranges and their values, formulas, and formatting.

tags.name: Tables
tags.description: CRUD operations on tables within a workbook.

tags.name: Table Columns
tags.description: Manage columns within a table, including filtering.

tags.name: Charts
tags.description: CRUD operations on charts within a worksheet.

tags.name: Named Items
tags.description: Access named items (named ranges and constants) in a workbook.

tags.name: Workbook Functions
tags.description: Invoke Excel workbook functions (SUM, AVERAGE, PMT, etc.) and get results.
